Parses a parameter line: "KeyName, value".
Parses a single reviewer line.
Parses a single submission line.
Parses a trimmed token as an integer with error context.
Splits a CSV line by commas, respecting double-quoted fields.

Parses a trimmed token as a boolean (0 or 1).
Adds a reviewer with duplicate-ID detection.
Adds a submission with duplicate-ID detection.

Number of reviewers.
Number of submissions.

Determines if a reviewer can review a submission based on domain matching.
Maps a reviewer's vector index to its graph node ID.

Determines if submission secondary domains should be used in matching.
Returns the number of nodes in the graph.
BFS on the residual graph to find the shortest augmenting path.
Determines which domain code caused the match between a reviewer and submission.
Disables all edges from a specific node by setting capacity to 0.

Builds the output path used in interactive mode.

Lists all submissions with their domains (and title/authors/email if available).
